prompt: what are people watching on youtube about the apple vision pro lately? i'm especially curious which videos are overperforming relative to how big the channel is.

assertions.text: Computes and shows the views-to-subscribers engagement ratio for each video
Explicitly calls out / interprets which videos overperform (high ratio) rather than only listing rows
Results are recent (roughly the last 6 months)
Includes the core metadata fields (title, channel, subscribers, views, URL)
